summary: PR 2267 advances Old Yoshi stage decompilation by defining stage callback/data tables, implementing several groldyoshi.c functions, refining Old Yoshi GroundVars types, and updating groldyoshi.h prototypes. Bot report records 4 new matches and 6 unmatched-item improvements for main/melee/gr/groldyoshi, including grOldYoshi_8020EAFC at 100% and grOldYoshi_8020EC10 at 95.82%. No human review comments were loaded.

key_files.role: Main implementation file: adds grOy stage callback/data definitions, Old Yoshi cloud and guest behavior functions, helper random/physics functions, joint mapping data, includes, and function bodies for previously stubbed or declared symbols.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/groldyoshi.c added 299 deleted 30 hunks 2
raw_diff: groldyoshi.c adds StageCallbacks grOy_803E6488 and StageData grOy_803E650C
raw_diff: implements grOldYoshi_8020EAFC, grOldYoshi_8020EC10, grOldYoshi_8020EFCC, grOldYoshi_8020F088, fn_8020F2A8, grOldYoshi_8020F31C
text_corpus: bot report lists groldyoshi code/data matches and improvements

key_files.role: Ground variable typing: replaces earlier grOldYoshi entries with cloud and guest GroundVars structs and adds union arms oldyoshicloud and oldyoshiguest.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/types.h added 21 deleted 12 hunks 4
raw_diff: removes struct grOldYoshi_Entry and struct grOldYoshi_GroundVars
raw_diff: adds grOldYoshi_Cloud, grOldYoshi_Cloud_GroundVars, grOldYoshi_Guest_GroundVars
raw_diff: Ground.gv union gains oldyoshicloud and oldyoshiguest

key_files.role: Header cleanup: removes unused forward includes and replaces unknown grOldYoshi_8020F31C declaration with recovered float signature; updates fn_8020F2A8 parameter type spelling from f32 to float.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/groldyoshi.h added 2 deleted 4 hunks 2
raw_diff: removes lb/forward.h and mp/forward.h includes
raw_diff: changes grOldYoshi_8020F31C from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to float(float,float,float,float,float,float)

what_changed.text: Defined Old Yoshi stage data in source, including grOy_803E6488 callbacks and grOy_803E650C StageData with asset path /GrOy.dat.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: groldyoshi.c StageCallbacks grOy_803E6488 and StageData grOy_803E650C additions

what_changed.text: Recovered cloud setup and update logic using a 3-entry loop over joint pairs stored in grOy_803E6574, typed through gp->gv.oldyoshicloud.cloud[i].
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grOldYoshi_8020EAFC for (i = 0; i < 3; i++) initializes oldyoshicloud cloud entries
raw_diff: grOldYoshi_8020EC10 do/while over i < 3 switches on xC4_0123

what_changed.text: Recovered Old Yoshi guest behavior state using gp->gv.oldyoshiguest fields, HSD_Randi/HSD_Randf, JObj visibility flags, and animation completion checks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grOldYoshi_8020EFCC initializes oldyoshiguest.xC4/xC6 and hides jobj
raw_diff: grOldYoshi_8020F088 selects from grOy_803B83F0, uses HSD_Randi/HSD_Randf, HSD_JObjSetTranslateY, HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll/ClearFlagsAll

what_changed.text: Converted Old Yoshi ground variable storage from a generic entry array to separate cloud and guest structs in Ground.gv.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h removes grOldYoshi_Entry and grOldYoshi_GroundVars
raw_diff: types.h adds grOldYoshi_Cloud_GroundVars and grOldYoshi_Guest_GroundVars union arms

what_changed.text: Updated header signatures to reflect recovered function types, especially grOldYoshi_8020F31C returning float with six float parameters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: groldyoshi.h grOldYoshi_8020F31C signature update
raw_diff: groldyoshi.c defines float grOldYoshi_8020F31C(float param1,float param2,float param3,float param4,float param5,float param6)

smart_moves.text: Used real GroundVars union arms for Old Yoshi cloud and guest state instead of continuing to access an undifferentiated oldyoshi entry array.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gp->gv.oldyoshicloud.cloud[i] accesses in groldyoshi.c
raw_diff: gp->gv.oldyoshiguest.xC4/xC6 accesses in groldyoshi.c
raw_diff: types.h adds oldyoshicloud and oldyoshiguest union arms

smart_moves.text: Collapsed repeated cloud initialization and callback matching into 3-entry loops keyed by grOy_803E6574, replacing the previous nested manual joint checks in fn_8020F2A8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grOldYoshi_8020EAFC for loop over i < 3
raw_diff: fn_8020F2A8 changed from nested joint_id checks using grOy_JointPair to for loop over grOy_803E6574

smart_moves.text: Moved recovered signature knowledge into the public header rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for grOldYoshi_8020F31C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: groldyoshi.h signature replacement for grOldYoshi_8020F31C

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a stage uses repeated per-joint state, a small indexed array plus loop can express the source more cleanly than repeated generated branch blocks, as shown by Old Yoshi cloud setup and callback lookup over three entries.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grOldYoshi_8020EAFC loops over three cloud entries
raw_diff: fn_8020F2A8 loops over grOy_803E6574 pairs instead of nested pointer checks

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered function bodies should drive header prototype cleanup when they establish concrete return and parameter types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grOldYoshi_8020F31C changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to float signature
raw_diff: groldyoshi.c defines matching float grOldYoshi_8020F31C implementation

decomp_lessons.lesson: Stage-specific GroundVars can be split by role when one stage object family uses distinct state layouts, such as Old Yoshi cloud entries versus guest state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: adds grOldYoshi_Cloud_GroundVars and grOldYoshi_Guest_GroundVars
raw_diff: groldyoshi.c uses oldyoshicloud in cloud functions and oldyoshiguest in guest functions

naming_conventions.meaning: Old Yoshi cloud platform state, with cloud[3] entries.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use typed bitfields for packed GroundVars state at gp+C4, including xC4_0123, xC4_4, and xC4_567.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct grOldYoshi_Cloud declares u32 xC4_0123:4, xC4_4:1, xC4_567:8
raw_diff: groldyoshi.c switches on xC4_0123 and updates xC4_4/xC4_567

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use an indexed joint-pair table for both collision callbacks and animation/JObj lookup: even indices are map joint ids and odd indices are JObj/animation ids.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: uses grOy_803E6574[i*2] with mpJointSetCb1/mpLib_80057BC0/mpJointListAdd
raw_diff: uses grOy_803E6574[i*2+1] with Ground_801C3FA4 and grAnime calls

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use indexed loops for repeated stage joint state when the repeated blocks differ only by table index.
